Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Pltf'S Responses To Written Discovery And Monetary , Evidentiary And Terminating Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Leticia Gonzalez, Esq., for defendant and moving party: The Home Doctors, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant The Home Doctors Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 14 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $560 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
